untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of specific failure patterns (springs/upthrusts) and momentum divergences at trend extremes. These pattern recognition elements cannot be expressed using only the available indicators and operators. Spring/upthrust patterns require multi-bar candle analysis and price rejection logic beyond the scope of simple indicator comparisons. Momentum 'divergence' and 'weakness' are qualitative assessments not directly available as indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate the intent using volume surge beyond prior extreme (entry) and momentum (RSI) confirmation, but the core pattern recognition (spring/upthrust failure patterns at trend extremes) is not translatable with available tools. A custom pattern detector would be required.
